mapper.select:
select * from user u,user_course uc,course c
u.username = #{username} and u.role = 'student' and uc.uid = u.course and c.course_id = uc.cid
and c.course_name like concat('%',#{subject},'%')
select course from user where username = #{username}
select course_id from course where course_name = #{subject}
select score from exam_condition where username = #{username} and subject = #{courseName} order by id desc limit 1
select e.question_id,e.content,e.score,e.type,e.options,e.subject from exam e where e.subject = #{subject}

select c.course_id, c.course_name, c.create_time, (select ec2.score from exam_condition ec2 where ec2.username = u.username and ec2.subject = c.course_name order by ec2.id desc limit 1) as score, uc.status from user u left join user_course uc on u.course = uc.uid left join course c on uc.cid = c.course_id where u.username = #{username} and u.role = 'student' order by c.course_id
select role from user where username = #{username}
